title: Gibson Assembly (NEBuilder)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3v3p6","text":"Gibson assembly using NEBuilder HiFi DNA assembly kit. Specification of the original NEB protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Set up assembly reaction on ice: %s %s 2–3 Fragment Assembly Recommended DNA Ratio vector:insert = 1:2 DNA X μl (50 ng vector, insert(s) based on that) NEBuilderHiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix 10 μl H2O 10-X μl Total Volume 20 μl
Incubate samples in a thermocycler at 50 C for 60 minutes
Store samples on ice or -20 C for subsequent transformation.
Transform 2 uL of assembled product into E. coli competent cells. For 10-beta E. coli cells provided with the kit, use NEBuilder transformation protocol.
creator: Snehadri Sinha
